items.title: Iran ceasefire deal gives Trump a way out of war - but at a high cost

items.title: Trump-backed Republican Clay Fuller wins election to replace Marjorie Taylor Greene
items.summary: He will serve out the rest of Marjorie Taylor Greene's term, which ends in January 2027.

items.title: Oil prices plunge and shares jump on US-Iran ceasefire plan

items.title: Wireless Festival cancelled after Kanye West blocked from coming to UK
items.summary: West was due to headline the festival in July but drew criticism over past antisemitic comments.

items.title: US journalist Shelly Kittleson released after kidnap in Iraq, officials say

items.title: Plan to scrap presidential elections puts Zimbabweans at loggerheads
items.summary: The ruling party has unveiled a draft law that strips voters of the chance to elect the president.

items.title: Has Artemis II shown we can land on the Moon again?
items.summary: The Artemis II mission has been near flawless to date, but has the test flight shown Nasa is ready to send humans to the lunar surface?

items.title: One gunman killed and two injured in shooting at Israeli consulate in Istanbul

items.title: WHO suspends Gaza medical evacuations after contractor killed by Israeli troops
items.summary: Israel's military says troops fired at a vehicle driven by the Palestinian because they believed it posed "an immediate threat".

items.title: French couple leave Iran after more than three years in jail
items.summary: Cecile Kohler and Jacques Paris are on their way home after being allowed to leave the country, the French president says.

items.title: Chilean woman accused of Pinochet-era kidnaps loses Australia extradition battle

items.summary: US Vice-President JD Vance intervenes in the campaign to give Orbán a ringing endorsement in Budapest.

items.title: One dead as train travelling 99mph collides with lorry in France
items.summary: The lorry driver is in custody after the train driver died during the collision in northern France.

items.title: Australia's most-decorated living soldier charged over alleged war crimes

items.title: Bahamas police search for US woman who reportedly fell off boat
items.summary: Her husband told authorities she fell out of their dinghy on Saturday night and was swept out to sea.

items.title: Rapper Offset in hospital after being shot in Florida

items.title: Vietnam's leader To Lam strengthens power in unanimous assembly vote
